title: DUX v9.5 UserOutcome Object
description: OKR-style tracking object linking user scenarios to measurable business outcomes

object_type.description: Object type discriminator - always 'UserOutcome' for UserOutcome objects

user_scenario.description: High-level scenario or context for this outcome

outcome_statement.description: Key Result-style statement with measurable target and timeframe

target_impact_when_achieved.description: Expected business or user impact when this outcome is achieved

priority.description: Business priority level for this outcome

related_problem_ids.description: Problem IDs that this outcome addresses

related_result_ids.description: Result IDs that contribute to this outcome

related_behavior_ids.description: Behavior IDs that enable this outcome

evidence_status.description: System-derived evidence quality: evidence_backed (2+ evidence, 1+ quantitative), evidence_present (1+ evidence, may lack quantitative), assumptive (recommend phase or no supporting evidence)

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this outcome's importance and achievability

evidence_teaser.description: Brief insight hook for pain points, stats, or key findings

tags.description: System-derived tags generated by NotebookLM DUX scan - not manually set
